case_title: 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC VS. DANIELLE DEMILLE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMILLE, DANIELLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #105, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC SERVED SEP-30-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEMILLE, DANIELLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 346 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC SERVED SEP-30-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DEMILLE, DANIELLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DEMILLE, DANIELLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL
